_meta.source: perks/weapons: darkanddarker.wiki.spellsandguns.com/Ranger; base stats & skills: api.darkerdb.com/v1/classes (merged by scripts/build-classes.mjs)

name: Ranger
perk_slot_rule: 1 slot + 1 additional slot every 5 levels; 4 slots at level 15 (max)

perks.name: Camping Mastery
perks.effect: +1500% Regular Interaction Speed while setting up campfires

perks.name: Crippling Shot
perks.effect: Leg hits inflict -40% Move Speed Bonus for 1s

perks.name: Crossbow Mastery
perks.effect: +5% Physical Power Bonus with crossbows; +50% Action Speed while reloading

perks.name: First Aid
perks.effect: +150% use speed for Bandages and Surgical Kits

perks.name: Kinesthesia
perks.effect: 15% movement multiplier while moving with bowstring drawn

perks.name: Longshot Expert
perks.effect: Up to +10 Physical Base Damage at 15m distance

perks.name: Point-Blank Expert
perks.effect: +3 True Physical Base Damage to targets within 6m

perks.name: Purge Shot
perks.effect: Ranged hits remove a random magical buff and deal 3 Neutral True Magical Base Damage

perks.name: Quick Reload
perks.effect: +50% Action Speed when reloading bows or firearms

perks.name: Ranged Weapons Mastery
perks.effect: +5% Physical Power Bonus with bows and crossbows

perks.name: Sharpshooter
perks.effect: +15% Headshot Damage Modifier with ranged weapons

perks.name: Spear Proficiency
perks.effect: Gain the ability to equip spears; +0.5% Move Speed Base

perks.name: Windfletch
perks.effect: +15% projectile speed for arrows and bolts

skills.name: Backstep
skills.effect: Quickly retreats a short distance. It can also be used in the air. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Explosive Shot
skills.effect: For seconds, attacks made with bows or crossbows cause fired projectiles to explode after 3 seconds, dealing fire magical damage to nearby enemies and applying Burn for second. Burn: The target takes fire magical damage. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Field Ration
skills.effect:
Forage food and recover health. Cooldown: seconds
Recharge: Campfire

skills.name: Forceful Shot
skills.effect: When using a bow-type weapon, gain the ability to knock targets back for seconds. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Multishot
skills.effect: Fire 5 arrows at once in a cone shaped dispersion. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Overdraw
skills.effect: When using bow-type weapons, maintaining a fully drawn bow increases weapon damage by per second, stacking for up to 3 seconds.

skills.name: Penetrating Shot
skills.effect: Gain headshot penetration and armor penetration for seconds. Bow and crossbow attacks pierce targets. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Quick Fire
skills.effect: Gain an additional action speed for seconds while using bow-type weapons. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: Quickshot
skills.effect: Fire arrows in a quick succession. Each bow-type will fire a different amount of arrows. Cooldown: seconds

skills.name: True Shot
skills.effect: Projectile flight speed is greatly increased, also increasing physical damage bonus by for seconds.
